LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT OMID NAIM, M.D'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO HERMAN AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 AND 3 TO PLEAD BREACH OF A DUTY OWED TO HIM; AND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2, TO PLEAD OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT DIRECTED TO HIM IF HE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 4 AND 6 TO PLEAD THE ELEMENTS OF AN ALLEGED FRAUD WITH PARTICULARITY. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO GABRIEL TO PLEAD COMPLIANCE WITH C C P SECTION 372 OR 376 (A). PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN CSR# 8189 (301/PJB)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT OMID NAIM, M.D'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 5. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO HERMAN AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1 AND 3 TO PLEAD BREACH OF A DUTY OWED TO HIM; AND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2, TO PLEAD OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT DIRECTED TO HIM IF HE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 4 AND 6 TO PLEAD THE ELEMENTS OF AN ALLEGED FRAUD WITH PARTICULARITY. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO GABRIEL TO PLEAD COMPLIANCE WITH C C P SECTION 372 OR 376 (A). Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol A. Karen CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/BD)
